title: Voidian726
body:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5685756f2a1288932154d753882011fe66e7697e.png)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A addon pack for palladium

|Voidian726|

|Warp| you can throw infinite ender pearls |

|Adrenaline| locked for 25 levels | gives speed,strength,jumpboost,resistance for 1 minute | cooldown 2 minutes and 30 seconds |

|Regen| locked for 20 levels | gives regeneration for 1 minute | cooldown 2 minutes and 30 seconds |

|Big| locked for 15 levels | Become big |

|Small| locked for 15 levels | Become small |

|Fall resistance| locked for 32 levels |

|Less health| you have 1 less heart

|Crafting recipes|

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Crafting recipe for iron syringe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab61ae60bfc206949928435d97b510d42ef95886.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Crafting recipe for Void syringe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f8d0626d99a42f5bf0b2311a7077c8341bfb33.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Crafting recipe for Void essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da98d0c0529a74952fef074dbe98004a85b679a3.png)
